labels.notes: Liquid nitrogen was DISCUSSED not APPLIED. Transcript: 'Let me grab some liquid nitrogen' then 'stuff over-the-counter does the same thing as liquid nitrogen... continue the over-the-counter one'. Cryotherapy not performed. Z117A + E542A wrongly billed. Q050A heart failure management also wrong — patient is on bisoprolol for hypertension, not CHF (no echo/HF documentation). Evidence cited for chf_management was 'BP monitoring 106/65, started bisoprolol, monitoring dizziness' = HTN management not CHF.
